data.title: Burnham Holdings, Inc. (OTC-Pink: BURCA) reports strong growth in Q2 2025, focused on long-term value creation.
data.description: Lancaster, Pennsylvania, July 24, 2025 - Burnham Holdings, Inc. (OTC-Pink: BURCA) announced robust growth driven by strategic portfolio adjustments, aiming to enhance long-term value creation. The company disclosed its latest financial report, showcasing positive outcomes for the second quarter.

data.title: Provident Financial Services, Inc. (NYSE:PFS) declares $0.24 quarterly cash dividend, payable on Aug 29, to stockholders as of Aug 15.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Iselin, N.J., Provident Financial Services, Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per common share. This dividend is set to be paid on August 29, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 15, 2025. The Company’s Board of Directors at NYSE:PFS approved this distribution for the benefit of its investors.

data.title: Celestia (TIA) dips 4.32% to $1.88 post Ethereum integration, testing critical $1.87 support with neutral RSI.
data.description: Despite a significant integration with Ethereum rollup, the price of TIA has experienced a 4.32% decrease, reaching $1.88. There is a key pivot level at $1.87 being tested, along with neutral RSI indicating a possible reversal zone.

data.title: Exactech updates reorganization plan, reaches agreement with Unsecured Creditors. Court date set for early September.
data.description: In early September, Exactech, a renowned global medical technology company, is set to have a court date for the confirmation of its reorganization plan and approval of sale. On July 24, 2025, the company filed its revised plan with the Court after successfully negotiating with the Unsecured Creditors. This development marks a significant step in the company's restructuring process, signaling a potential resolution to the financial challenges it faces. Stay tuned for updates on this evolving situation.

data.title: Residents in Granbury, Texas claim that "Every family here is sick" due to noise pollution from a Bitcoin mining facility. See More Perfect Union video for more.
data.description: Residents of Granbury, Texas, are the subject of a recent More Perfect Union video revealing the challenges faced by those living with the constant noise from a Bitcoin mining operation.

data.title: Brag House secures $15M investment with PIPE financing from institutional investor as of July 24, 2025.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Brag House Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TBH) disclosed it is engaging in a private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing. The company, known for its Gen Z engagement platform at the convergence of gaming, college sports, and digital media, has entered a securities purchase agreement with an institutional investor. This move is anticipated to yield roughly $15 million in gross proceeds for Brag House, excluding placement agent fees and offering expenses.

data.title: LDO price spikes to $1.10 with 1.66% gains driven by whale activity and $1M investment, ignoring profit-taking.
data.description: The digital asset LDO is currently trading at $1.10, reflecting a daily increase of 1.66%. This price surge can be attributed to significant accumulation by a whale investor and a substantial $1 million investment by Arthur Hayes. Despite some profit-taking in the recent past, the market is experiencing a strong bullish momentum.

data.title: SouthState Corp. reports Q2 2025 results, increases cash dividend. NYSE: SSB. Financial data for June 30, 2025.
data.description: In Winter Haven, Florida, on July 24, 2025, SouthState Corporation (NYSE: SSB) shared its unaudited financial data for the quarter and half-year ending June 30, 2025. The company reported that growth had quickened during this time frame...
